_help: Optional. Copy this file to ~/.tokentrim/config.json (Windows: %USERPROFILE%\.tokentrim\config.json). All keys are optional. A .tokentrim.json in a repo root overrides these per project.
_exclude: Commands to leave untouched (always passthrough), e.g. interactive tools.
_tee_mode: 'failures' (default) saves full raw output only when a command fails; 'always' saves every time; 'never' disables it.
_ultra: true = extra-compact output everywhere (signatures for code, tighter tables).
_budget: Hard cap: no command output may exceed ~N tokens (0 = disabled). Also available per run: tt --budget N <cmd>, or TT_BUDGET env var.
_price_per_1k: Optional $ price per 1K tokens; when set, `tt gain` also shows money saved (e.g. 0.003).
_resource_include: Regex patterns; when set, terraform/cost presets keep ONLY matching resource addresses/groups (e.g. work on one Business Unit).
_resource_exclude: Regex patterns to drop matching resource addresses/groups from terraform/cost presets.
_session_cache: true = for read-only commands: byte-identical output shows 'unchanged since ...'; slightly changed output shows only the changed lines. Safe: the command still runs.
